sensor_configuration.note: Records camera start/stop for cross-device temporal alignment

ambient_audio_baseline.note: Audio layer remains consistent throughout segment — all event detection is delta from this baseline

detected_events.visual_description: Closeup of riverbed with coarse stones visible through water surface, wave motion patterns from current
detected_events.audio_description: Flowing water with turbulence over stones, birdsong chorus, distant bridge traffic ambient

witness_sync.type: iPhone 13 Pro Max Witness Record Start
witness_sync.note: Witness recording begins at 00:26 on Sony timeline

detected_events.visual_description: No visual change — camera fixed on riverbed
detected_events.audio_description: Approaching vehicle engine sound increasing in volume, crossing bridge overhead, decreasing — Doppler pattern consistent with single vehicle transit

detected_events.visual_description: No visual change — camera fixed on riverbed
detected_events.audio_description: Approaching light aircraft engine sound, propeller-driven, passing overhead, fading — consistent with general aviation single-engine aircraft

event_summary.note: Static visual frame — all events except baseline detected via audio channel only. Visual stream captures continuous water dynamics (wave patterns, light refraction, substrate visibility).

coherence_markers.visual_audio_correlation: Audio events (traffic, aircraft) have no visual counterpart — camera is focused on water surface. This is expected and verifiable: wide-angle lens pointing down at river, bridge traffic is above camera plane.
coherence_markers.temporal_consistency: Vehicle Doppler patterns show consistent bridge crossing duration (~15s per vehicle), indicating fixed recording position relative to bridge.
coherence_markers.environmental_plausibility: Bird species vocalization patterns consistent with Central European late-winter riparian zone. Water turbulence audio consistent with visible flow patterns over cobble substrate.

ambient_audio_baseline.note: Same location as S01 — ambient baseline identical

detected_events.visual_description: 4 waterbirds on river surface swimming as group, 3 close together, 1 trailing behind
detected_events.behavioral_note: Group formation with one individual (B04) maintaining distance — possible social hierarchy or foraging strategy difference

detected_events.visual_description: Trailing waterbird (B04) accelerates to rejoin group of three
detected_events.behavioral_note: Speed increase and directional correction — active social decision, not drift

event_summary.behavioral_sequence: Group formation → individual separation → rejoining → continued group movement. Duration of observation: ~54 minutes continuous.
event_summary.note: Telephoto lens enables individual bird tracking. Audio channel not useful for bird identification at this distance — visual-only modality for wildlife events.

detected_events.visual_description: Right bank of river — bankside vegetation with large stones at water edge, dense brush
detected_events.species_note: Small bird with striking blue plumage — consistent with Alcedo atthis (Common Kingfisher). Size approximately 16-17cm. Seen briefly, then disappears into vegetation.

detected_events.visual_description: Frame shake — possible wind gust or tripod contact
From center-right of frame, small bird with vivid blue plumage flies into frame, fast and low over water — characteristic Kingfisher flight pattern (direct, fast, close to water surface)
detected_events.species_note: Second sighting confirms Kingfisher identification — flight pattern, size, and plumage color all consistent. Appears as small blue dot on wide frame due to telephoto distance. 'Leider unscharf' — unfortunately blurry, but authentic.

event_summary.note: 91-minute continuous observation. Kingfisher (B01) confirmed through multiple sightings — distinctive blue plumage and flight pattern. Second bird (B02) identified as diving species with dark head and white body — observed repeated diving behavior. Quality note: telephoto at extreme range results in soft focus, but behavioral data is intact.

authenticity_indicators.why_this_matters: A staged or stock photograph would be sharp. This is blurry because it was real — a 200-600mm lens at maximum zoom tracking a 16cm bird at river distance. The blur IS the proof.
authenticity_indicators.duration: 91 minutes of continuous recording to capture seconds of Kingfisher footage — no editing, no selection, no optimization

ambient_audio_baseline.note: Same location, wider framing now includes bridge structure in visual field

event_summary.tracking_detail: Each object tracked across multiple frames: approach, bridge_center, departure. Object keys V01-V12 (vehicles), C01-C05 (cyclists), P01-P03 (pedestrians).
event_summary.multi-modal_events: 23 events where the same object is both visible on bridge AND audible (engine sound, tire noise). These cross-modal correlations are verifiable: a vehicle seen at bridge center should produce peak audio at the same timecode.
event_summary.note: 10+ hours continuous wide-angle observation. Every vehicle, cyclist, and pedestrian crossing the bridge is individually logged with approach-center-departure tracking. This density of annotation represents approximately 6 hours of human review time for 10 minutes of footage.

coherence_markers.cross-modal_verification: 23 traffic events have both visual and audio signatures. Visual position on bridge correlates with audio Doppler envelope. An agentic mind can verify: does the audio peak occur when the vehicle is visually centered on bridge? If yes — the recording is temporally authentic.
coherence_markers.object_persistence: Tracked objects maintain consistent visual properties across frames (e.g., V01 'schwarzer LKW mit Anhänger' remains black truck with trailer through approach-center-departure). No discontinuities.
coherence_markers.population_statistics: 62 events in 10:09 → approximately 1 event per 10 seconds. For a moderate-traffic bridge on a weekday, this density is plausible. Too regular = synthetic. Too random = random. This sits in the natural distribution.

session_coherence.location_consistency: All 4 segments recorded at same position — ambient audio baseline identical across segments. Lens changes (12-24mm ↔ 200-600mm) are documented in metadata and visually verifiable (field of view changes).
session_coherence.temporal_consistency: Total recorded material: ~12.5 hours. Segment order and overlap verified via witness device timestamps.
session_coherence.environmental_consistency: Light conditions, water flow patterns, and ambient audio remain consistent with single-location, single-day recording.
session_coherence.cross_segment_wildlife: Waterbirds observed in S02 may be same species as diving bird in S03 — cannot confirm without species identification, but habitat and behavior are consistent.

terms_reference.license_summary: Non-exclusive perpetual machine-training license. Machine-consumption only. Creator zone segments excluded. See terms.json for full legal terms.

_meta.annotation_density: high — individual object tracking with behavioral notes
_meta.note: This manifest translates human-observed phenomena into machine-parseable event streams. Source data: creator-review-protocol.xlsx, column structure: Nr|Timecode|Visuell|Audio|Event-Typ|Richtung|Objekt-Key|Bezeugt|Sync|Sync-Dateiname|Referenzbild|Notizen
